document.source_title: RR vs LSG IPL 2026 Playing 11 Today Match: Ravindra Jadeja to return for Rajasthan Royals vs Lucknow Super Giants in Jaipur
document.summary: The Rajasthan Royals are set to face the Lucknow Super Giants in Jaipur, with Ravindra Jadeja making his return to the team. Both teams have struggled in the latter half of the season, with Rajasthan's performance in bowling and batting being notably below par. The predicted playing XI for both teams has been announced, highlighting key players for the match.
key_takeaways: Ravindra Jadeja returns to the Rajasthan Royals lineup.
Both teams have experienced a decline in performance this season.
Rajasthan's predicted XI includes Yashasvi Jaiswal and Jofra Archer.
Lucknow's predicted XI features Rishabh Pant as captain and wicketkeeper.
The match is crucial for both teams to regain form.
The performance of key players will be pivotal in determining the match outcome.
document.why_it_matters: This match is significant as it could impact the standings in the IPL 2026 season, especially for teams like Rajasthan Royals and Lucknow Super Giants, who are looking to recover from recent poor performances.
